languages.text: В преддверии гробницы покоятся древние, иссохшие останки служителя Омниссии. Возможно, при нем сохранились записи о его судьбе.

traits.locale_text: В преддверии гробницы покоятся древние, иссохшие останки служителя Омниссии. Возможно, при нем сохранились записи о его судьбе.

languages.text: Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.
languages.original_text: В преддверии гробницы покоятся древние, иссохшие останки служителя Омниссии. Возможно, при нем сохранились записи о его судьбе.

traits.locale_text: Ancient, dried-out remains of a servant of the Omnissiah rest at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.
Ancient, dried-out remains of a servant of the Omnissiah rest at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.
Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.
Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.

languages.text: Am Eingang der Gruft liegen alte, verwitterte Überreste eines Dieners des Omnissiah. Möglicherweise hat er Aufzeichnungen über sein Schicksal bei sich.
languages.original_text: Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.

traits.locale_text: Am Eingang der Gruft liegen alte, verwitterte Überreste eines Dieners des Omnissiah. Möglicherweise hat er Aufzeichnungen über sein Schicksal bei sich.

languages.text: Le cadavre desséché d'un serviteur de l'Omnimessie gît à l'entrée de la tombe. Il a peut-être sur lui un journal qui pourrait expliquer ce qui lui est arrivé.
languages.original_text: Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.

traits.locale_text: Le cadavre desséché d'un serviteur de l'Omnimessie gît à l'entrée de la tombe. Il a peut-être sur lui un journal qui pourrait expliquer ce qui lui est arrivé.

languages.text: 墓穴入口处躺着一具欧姆尼赛亚仆从的古老干尸。也许他随身带着讲述其遭遇的日志。
languages.original_text: Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.

traits.locale_text: 墓穴入口处躺着一具欧姆尼赛亚仆从的古老干尸。也许他随身带着讲述其遭遇的日志。

languages.text: Los restos antiguos y resecos de un sirviente del Omnissiah yacen ante la entrada de la tumba. Tal vez tenga algún registro de lo que sucedió.
languages.original_text: Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.

traits.locale_text: Los restos antiguos y resecos de un sirviente del Omnissiah yacen ante la entrada de la tumba. Tal vez tenga algún registro de lo que sucedió.

languages.text: 墓の前庭には、オムニシスの使用人の古ぼけた遺骸が横たわっている。遺体には彼の運命が記録されているかもしれない。
languages.original_text: In the vestibule of the tomb lie the ancient, desiccated remains of an Omnissian servant. There may be records of his fate on the body

languages.text: Hermesih'in bir hizmetkârının kadim, kurumuş kalıntıları mezar girişinde yatıyor. Kaderiyle ilgili kayıtlar taşıyor olması muhtemel.
languages.original_text: Ancient, desiccated remains of a servant of the Omnissiah lie at the tomb entrance. It is possible he carries logs regarding his fate.

traits.locale_text: Hermesih'in bir hizmetkârının kadim, kurumuş kalıntıları mezar girişinde yatıyor. Kaderiyle ilgili kayıtlar taşıyor olması muhtemel.
